programs.title: America's National Parks
programs.desc:
The creators of the series discover the majesty of the most interesting national parks located in the USA.They attract millions of tourists from all over the world.You can admire breathtaking landscapes from popular viewpoints.Viewers will see the beauty of eight national parks from a less obvious perspective.They will move not only to the famous Grand Canyon, but also to less familiar places.They will learn about the guards' favorite places and what makes each of these protected areas so special.They will also see what animals live in these places and what their life is like in the bosom of nature.The latest technologies were used to produce the series, including:drones and cameras with telephoto lenses
A visit to the most spectacular places in the United States.It was in this country that the first official national park in the world - Yellowstone - was created in 1872.Documentarians combined spectacular photos with engaging narration and music, creating a story about magical places and their inhabitants.In subsequent episodes, they discover the secrets of, among others, Badlands National Park in South Dakota and volcanic Hawaii.The beginning of their expedition is the park, whose unique landscape attracts approximately six million tourists from all over the world every year.Rocks teeming with life Grand Canyon National Park was established in 1919.Characteristic layers in the rock formations provide insight into the history of the Earth dating back millions of years.California condors nest here.Each of them is marked and monitored by scientists who managed to recreate the disappearing population.Cameras follow the growth of one of the predatory chicks - from hatching to its first flight.Viewers will watch the hunting of a fawn puma and an Arizona heloderma.They meet the inhabitants of the forest-covered Kaibab Plateau.They will see why the monumental rocks of the canyon were a sacred place for Indian tribes.

programs.title: Critter Fixers: Country Vets: Compilations 3
programs.desc: Vernard and Terrence run a veterinary clinic in Georgia where they help animals of many species.Patients and their caregivers appreciate the commitment with which they approach each case.

programs.title: Animal Fight Club
programs.desc: This time we will see how dangerous they are, among others:majestic grizzlies.The only threat to these powerful bears are other individuals of the same species.We will see a brutal clash of these extremely strong, massive animals.The program also includes big cats that do not tolerate other predators in their territory.A clever serval manages to outsmart the fast cheetahs.We will also look at how the venomous Levantine viper attacks.This episode also includes scenes from Madagascar - a herd of lemurs defends access to food.

programs.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programs.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.

programs.title: Europe From Above 4
programs.desc: The Old Continent seen from an extraordinary perspective.A bird's eye view will allow you to discover architectural treasures as well as natural gems.Europe will also be shown during different seasons.
